mapper.select: SELECT post_id, user_id, title, content, sport_type, image_urls, audit_status, reject_reason, create_time, update_time, like_count FROM post WHERE post_id = #{postId}
SELECT post_id, user_id, title, content, sport_type, image_urls, audit_status, reject_reason, create_time, update_time, like_count FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post (user_id, title, content, sport_type, image_urls, audit_status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{sportType}, #{imageUrls}, #{auditStatus}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, sport_type = #{sportType}, image_urls = #{imageUrls}, update_time = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
